title: Zero Trust Basics for Small Security Teams
excerpt: A practical introduction to implementing Zero Trust principles without enterprise-sized budgets.
author: Joe Bains
content:
## Why Zero Trust matters

Zero Trust starts with a simple assumption: never trust, always verify.

For smaller teams, the goal is not to buy every tool. Instead, focus on strong identity controls, endpoint posture checks, and least-privilege access.

## First 30-day plan

1. Require MFA everywhere possible.
2. Review and remove stale user accounts.
3. Segment high-risk internal systems.
4. Add logging around privileged actions.

## What success looks like

If a compromised account cannot laterally move across your environment, you are on the right path.
